purpose: Phase 20 Growth Command / KPI Tracking Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This defines public measurement lanes that connect opt-ins, offers, campaigns, share kits, feeds, books, and trust routes into trackable growth workflows.
rules: Growth pages are planning dashboards, not live analytics claims.
Every lane must include a conversion goal, source route, target route, and trust boundary.
UTM plans must be readable and reusable without private data.
Tracking plans should help market books without exaggerating evidence strength.
Every KPI route should connect to opt-in, offer, campaign, and evidence/trust pages where relevant.
Downloads must be public templates only, not customer lists or private analytics exports.

lanes.title: Black File Funnel KPI Lane
lanes.label: Starter funnel metrics
lanes.summary: Track readers moving from Black File curiosity into opt-in, starter offer, and book routes.
lanes.goal: Turn first-time readers into opt-ins and starter-library buyers.

lanes.title: D.O.G Collector KPI Lane
lanes.label: Premium book metrics
lanes.summary: Track readers moving from D.O.G symbolic interest into the collector offer and Amazon store route.
lanes.goal: Convert symbolic-power readers into D.O.G collector buyers.

lanes.title: Intelligence Series KPI Lane
lanes.label: Agency series metrics
lanes.summary: Track readers moving from agency maps and dossiers into the intelligence offer and book series path.
lanes.goal: Turn intelligence-archive readers into series buyers.

lanes.title: Crime Dossiers KPI Lane
lanes.label: Crime series metrics
lanes.summary: Track organized-crime readers from crime-state maps into opt-ins, offers, and book routes.
lanes.goal: Convert crime-network readers into crime dossier buyers.

lanes.title: Trust First KPI Lane
lanes.label: Credibility metrics
lanes.summary: Track skeptical readers from trust/evidence pages into opt-ins, offers, and book routes.
lanes.goal: Move skeptical readers from trust validation into the archive and book universe.

lanes.title: Full Archive KPI Lane
lanes.label: System-wide metrics
lanes.summary: Track the full route from homepage to opt-in, offer center, launch room, book universe, and Amazon store.
lanes.goal: Guide readers through the complete Matrix Reprogrammed sales ladder.
